title: The Importance of Understanding Internal Controls for a Successful Research Enterprise — D-RED Seminar Slides
content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-07-13 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'The Importance of Understanding Internal Controls for a Successful Research Enterprise', co-presented by Alan Small and Abe Mauer. Covers higher-education internal controls framework and how it underpins compliant research administration. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/-qsgDKhsW5_QSI9hGZlHr-VGlF-vxGLpywaJKVkb35EWeOEY_IK1ftGIsLj2ciCy._pWdQDnkSWgqMwSe
